text:
Created attachment 251465
Patch for libcmis

Backport upstream commit 72618e63433c7243e4d9e79a638f19a09402eecc
While at it adjust port Makefile to more closely follow Porters Handbook

Reference:
https://github.com/tdf/libcmis/commit/72618e63433c7243e4d9e79a638f19a09402eecc

Compile tested on FreeBSD 14.0-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist)

Poudriere testport OK 13.2-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 14.0-RELEASE (amd64)
